title: Whispers of Dusk
description: A quiet evening where the sky melts into the sea. Soft whispers of waves, a gentle breeze, and the last light of day remind me that beautiful endings make way for new beginnings.
thoughts: This painting was done on a calm evening by the shore. The colors came naturally, just like the moment itself. It's a reminder to pause, breathe, and be present.

title: Tulip Painting
description: Tulips standing tall in their full elegance. A study on botanical grace.
thoughts: Captured the delicate texture of petals in early morning light. Each stroke represents the growth and bloom of a soulful journey.

title: Rainy Strolls
description: A vibrant street scene bathed in neon reflections on a wet evening.
thoughts: The challenge was capturing the light diffusion on wet pavement. It reflects the beauty found in chaotic, rainy city nights.
